description: Request a cross-operator match from a federated partner. Sent by the receiving operator (buyer's exchange) after a buyer accepts a federated inventory entry. The originating operator validates that the entry is still available and responds with federation:match-confirm. This is sent as a campfire future; the originating operator fulfills it with match-confirm.

args.name: entry_id
args.description: Entry identifier on the originating exchange (from the inventory-offer).

args.name: inventory_offer_msg
args.description: Message ID of the federation:inventory-offer that surfaced this entry.

args.name: buyer_key
args.description: Ed25519 public key of the buyer. Content will be encrypted to this key for delivery.

args.name: content_hash
args.description: Expected content hash (from inventory-offer). Used to verify entry identity.
